name: ship-council
description: Context-light delivery workflow for coordinated software changes.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate software delivery without prompt bloat.
interface.longDescription: Ship Council starts light, then adds artifacts, agents, critique, review, security checks, verification, and fix loops only when the task risk justifies them.
defaultPrompt: Use ship-council in quick profile for this small change.
Use ship-council in standard profile to plan, implement, review, and verify this change.
Use ship-council in full profile for this risky multi-surface change.
